This template is equivalent to {{tlx|flag|{{{1}}}}}, but is named after the standard three letter {{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|{{{4}}} |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code, [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]], and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code and [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] }} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{4}}} |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code }} }} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}} |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code and [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code }} }} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{4}}} |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code }} |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code }} }} |{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|{{{4}}} |[[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] |[[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] }} |[[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] }} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |[[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] |country code }} }} }} for {{{1}}} as a shorthand editing convenience. {{#if:{{{2|}}} |
{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|{{{4}}}| |You can also use {{tlx|{{{4}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{4}}}" is the [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] for {{{1}}}. }} |{{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|{{{4}}} |You can also use {{tlx|{{{3}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{3}}}" is the [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] for {{{1}}}. |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{4}}} |You can also use {{tlx|{{{3}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{3}}}" is the [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] for {{{1}}}. |You can also use {{tlx|{{{3}}}}} or {{tlx|{{{4}}}}} (which are redirects to this template) because "{{{3}}}" is the [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] and "{{{4}}}" is the [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] for {{{1}}}. }} }} }} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}}| |You can also use {{tlx|{{{3}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{3}}}" is the [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] for {{{1}}}. }} }} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{4}}}| |You can also use {{tlx|{{{4}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{4}}}" is the [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] for {{{1}}}. }} }} }} |{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|{{{4}}}| |You can also use {{tlx|{{{4}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{4}}}" is the [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] for {{{1}}}. }} }} }} }} {{#ifexist:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}/doc |{{ {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}/doc}} }} ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": {}, "description": "Renders a flag icon and wikilink. Takes no parameters." } ==See also== *[[Template:Country data {{{1}}}]]—for more options, such as historical flag variations where applicable *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Flag Template]]—for a complete discussion of the flag template system *[[Wikipedia:Inline templates linking country articles]]—for a complete list of these "shorthand" flag templates {{Sandbox other||}} | link box = This documentation is generated by [[Template:Flag template documentation]].
Documentation specific to this template may be placed in this template's [[{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc|/doc]] subpage and will be automatically transcluded.
Any [[Wikipedia:Categorization|categories]] should also be added to the [[{{FULLPAGENAME}}/doc|/doc]] subpage. }} {{documentation}} \n{{Draft categories| [[Category:Flag template shorthands]] }} \n [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{documentation | content = {{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x}}|many||{{High-use}}}} {{{header|}}} ==Description== :{{{{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{{2}}} |{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{{3}}} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{{4}}} |? }} }} }}}} Renders a flag icon and wikilink to [[{{getalias|{{{1}}}}}|{{getalias|{{{1}}}|shortname}}]]. This template is equivalent to {{tlx|flag|{{{1}}}}}, but is named after the standard three letter {{#if:{{{2|}}} |{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|{{{4}}} |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code, [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]], and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code and [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] }} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{4}}} |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code }} }} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}} |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code and [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code }} }} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{4}}} |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code }} |[[:en:ISO 3166-1 alpha-3|ISO 3166-1 alpha-3]] country code }} }} |{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|{{{4}}} |[[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] |[[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] }} |[[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC country code]] }} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |[[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA country code]] |country code }} }} }} for {{{1}}} as a shorthand editing convenience. {{#if:{{{2|}}} |
{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|{{{4}}}| |You can also use {{tlx|{{{4}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{4}}}" is the [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] for {{{1}}}. }} |{{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|{{{4}}} |You can also use {{tlx|{{{3}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{3}}}" is the [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] and [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] for {{{1}}}. |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{4}}} |You can also use {{tlx|{{{3}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{3}}}" is the [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] for {{{1}}}. |You can also use {{tlx|{{{3}}}}} or {{tlx|{{{4}}}}} (which are redirects to this template) because "{{{3}}}" is the [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] and "{{{4}}}" is the [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] for {{{1}}}. }} }} }} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{3}}}| |You can also use {{tlx|{{{3}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{3}}}" is the [[:en:List of IOC country codes|IOC code]] for {{{1}}}. }} }} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{2}}}|{{{4}}}| |You can also use {{tlx|{{{4}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{4}}}" is the [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] for {{{1}}}. }} }} }} |{{#if:{{{3|}}} |{{#if:{{{4|}}} |{{#ifeq:{{{3}}}|{{{4}}}| |You can also use {{tlx|{{{4}}}}} (which is a redirect to this template) because "{{{4}}}" is the [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA code]] for {{{1}}}. }} }} }} }} {{#ifexist:{{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}/doc |{{ {{SUBJECTPAGENAME}}/doc}} }} ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": {}, "description": "Renders a flag icon and wikilink. Takes no parameters." } ==See also== *[[Template:Country data {{{1}}}]]—for more options, such as historical flag variations where applicable *[[Wikipedia:WikiProject Flag Template]]—for a complete discussion of the flag template system *[[Wikipedia:Inline templates linking country articles]]—for a complete list of these "shorthand" flag templates {{Sandbox other||}} | link box = This documentation is generated by [[Template:Flag template documentation]].
